item.title: Version 1.2.0
item.description:
• New: Enroll up to 3 different faces so family or coworkers can also unlock apps
  • New: Choose between your built-in camera and an external USB webcam
  • New: Pick how the auto-lock timer counts — from your last unlock, or from when FaceGate detects you stepped away
  • New: Each locked app can have its own timer mode
  • New: You can now disable the Emergency Kill Shortcut in Settings if you keep triggering it by accident
  • New: Face enrollment is simpler — just look straight, left, and right (no more head tilt)
  • Fix: Touch ID prompt no longer gets stuck on screen after switching back to face unlock
  • Fix: Lock screen windows no longer lose focus after authenticating with Touch ID or password
  • Fix: Fixed a rare crash when rapidly locking and unlocking apps
  • Fix: Display brightness is no longer left at maximum after closing the enrollment window
  • Fix: Face unlock is more secure with constant-time password checking
  • Fix: Sparkle updates now show a helpful alert if macOS uninstall protection blocks the update

item.title: Version 1.1.1
item.description:
• Fix: Display brightness no longer stuck at max when closing enrollment window early
  • Fix: onDisappear handler cancels enrollment on window close
  • Add: Sponsor on GitHub link in About page

item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description:
• New: Camera picker — choose between built-in and external USB cameras
  • New: External camera auto-detection with user override
  • Fix: About page now shows correct version from bundle

item.title: Version 1.0.1
item.description:
• Fix: 'Disable Face Unlock during certain hours' now works when toggled on mid-window
  • Fix: FaceAuthManager correctly falls back to default hours when UserDefaults keys are missing

item.title: Version 1.0.0
item.description:
• Initial release
  • App locking with face recognition
  • Touch ID and password fallback
  • Liveness detection
  • Session timers and lock-on-sleep
